name: Contrast Ratio Minimum
description: Minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text; 3:1 for large text (18px+ or 14px bold).

name: Visible Focus Rings
description: Visible focus rings on interactive elements (2-4px outline). Never remove focus outline.
tags: focus ring keyboard accessibility tab navigation

name: Descriptive Alt Text
description: All meaningful images must have descriptive alt text. Decorative images use alt=''.
tags: alt text images accessibility screen reader

name: ARIA Labels for Icon-only Buttons
description: Icon-only buttons require aria-label. Never leave interactive elements unlabeled.

name: Keyboard Navigation Order
description: Tab order must match visual reading order. All interactive elements must be keyboard-reachable.

name: Form Field Labels
description: Every input must have an explicit visible label. Placeholder text is not a label.

name: Skip to Main Content
description: First focusable element should be skip navigation link for keyboard users.

name: Sequential Heading Hierarchy
description: Use h1→h6 in order. Never skip levels (h1 then h3). One h1 per page.
tags: heading hierarchy h1 h2 h3 accessibility structure

name: Color Not the Only Indicator
description: Never convey information by color alone. Add icon text pattern as supplement.

name: Respect prefers-reduced-motion
description: Reduce or disable animations when user has enabled reduced motion system preference.

name: Minimum Touch Target Size
description: Touch targets must be at least 44×44px. Extend hit area with padding if visual is smaller.

name: Touch Target Spacing
description: Minimum 8px gap between adjacent touch targets to prevent mis-taps.

name: Tap Not Hover for Primary Actions
description: Don't rely on hover-only interactions. All primary actions must work on tap/click.

name: Disable Button During Async
description: Disable submit buttons during async operations. Show loading spinner or skeleton.

name: Error Message Near Problem
description: Show validation errors immediately below the related field not just at top of form.

name: Cursor Pointer on Clickable Elements
description: Add cursor-pointer CSS to all clickable non-button elements.

name: Use WebP/AVIF Image Formats
description: Convert images to WebP or AVIF. Use responsive srcset/sizes. Lazy load below fold.

name: Declare Image Dimensions
description: Always declare width and height on images to prevent Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS).
tags: cls layout shift image dimensions performance

name: Font Display Swap
description: Use font-display: swap to prevent invisible text during font load (FOIT).

name: Lazy Load Below-Fold Content
description: Use dynamic import() for routes and React.lazy for components not visible on initial load.
tags: lazy loading code splitting below fold

name: Split Code by Route
description: Use React.lazy + Suspense to split code by route. Reduces initial bundle and TTI.
tags: bundle splitting code split route performance

name: Skeleton Screens Over Spinners
description: Use skeleton screens for operations >300ms. Spinner only for <300ms operations.

name: Virtualize Lists Over 50 Items
description: Use virtualization for lists with 50+ items to avoid rendering all DOM nodes.

name: Debounce/Throttle High-Frequency Events
description: Apply debounce to search inputs (300ms) and throttle to scroll resize handlers.

name: Match Style to Product Type
description: Choose UI style based on product category and user expectations not personal preference.

name: Visual Consistency Across Pages
description: Use the same style effects radius shadows across all pages. Inconsistency breaks trust.

name: SVG Icons Not Emojis
description: Use vector icon libraries (Lucide Heroicons) never emojis as structural UI icons.

name: Effects Match Chosen Style
description: Shadows blur radius must align with the chosen style. No glassmorphism in flat design.
tags: effects shadows blur radius style consistency

name: One Primary Action Per Screen
description: Each screen/view should have exactly one primary CTA. Secondary actions are visually subordinate.

name: Viewport Meta Tag
description: Always include <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width initial-scale=1'>. Never disable zoom.

name: Mobile-First Design
description: Design for 375px first then scale up. Don't design desktop and adapt down.

name: Systematic Breakpoints
description: Use consistent breakpoints: 375/768/1024/1440. Don't use random pixel values.

name: Minimum 16px Body Text on Mobile
description: Body text minimum 16px on mobile to prevent iOS auto-zoom on input focus.

name: No Horizontal Scroll
description: Content must fit viewport width on mobile. No horizontal scroll except intentional carousels.

name: 8pt/8dp Spacing System
description: Use 4pt/8pt incremental spacing. Avoid arbitrary pixel values for margins/padding.

name: Define Z-Index Scale
description: Create z-index scale: 0/10/20/40/100/1000. Don't use z-index: 9999.

name: Show Core Content First
description: On mobile show primary content first. Fold or hide secondary content.

name: Visual Hierarchy via Size Spacing Contrast
description: Establish hierarchy through size spacing and contrast — not color alone.

name: Line Height 1.5-1.75 for Body
description: Body text needs 1.5-1.75 line-height for readability. Headings can be tighter (1.2-1.3).

name: 65-75 Characters Per Line
description: Limit line length to 65-75 characters. Too wide causes eye strain too narrow breaks reading flow.

name: Consistent Type Scale
description: Use a defined type scale: 12/14/16/18/24/32/48px. Avoid arbitrary font sizes.
tags: type scale font size consistent hierarchy

name: Font Weight Hierarchy
description: Bold headings (600-700) Regular body (400) Medium labels (500). Weight conveys importance.
tags: font weight hierarchy bold medium regular

name: Semantic Color Tokens
description: Define semantic tokens (primary secondary error surface) not raw hex in components.

name: Tabular Numbers for Data
description: Use tabular/monospaced figures for number columns prices and timers.

name: 150-300ms for Micro-interactions
description: Micro-interactions: 150-300ms. Complex transitions: max 400ms. Never >500ms for UI.

name: Animate Only Transform and Opacity
description: Use transform and opacity for animations. Avoid animating width height top left (causes reflow).

name: Skeleton for Operations >300ms
description: Show skeleton/progress when content takes >300ms to load.

name: Ease-out Enter Ease-in Exit
description: Elements entering the view: ease-out. Elements leaving: ease-in. Never linear for UI.
tags: easing ease-out ease-in animation enter exit

name: Animation Must Have Meaning
description: Every animation must express cause-effect. No purely decorative animations.

name: Animations Must Be Interruptible
description: User action (click/hover/tap) must immediately interrupt in-progress animations.

name: Scale Feedback on Clickable Cards
description: Subtle scale (0.98-1.02) on press for clickable cards and buttons. Restore on release.
tags: scale press feedback clickable cards buttons

name: Visible Labels for Every Input
description: Every input requires a visible label. Placeholder text disappears on type — not a label.

name: Errors Below Related Field
description: Show validation errors directly below the failing field not only at form top.
tags: error validation placement below field form

name: Loading State on Form Submit
description: Show loading state during form submission. Show success or error after response.
tags: form submit loading success error feedback

name: Mark Required Fields
description: Indicate required fields with asterisk (*) or mark optional fields explicitly.

name: Helpful Empty States
description: When no data exists show an informative message and a clear action (not a blank screen).
tags: empty state no data message action

name: Auto-dismiss Toasts 3-5s
description: Success toasts auto-dismiss in 3-5 seconds. Errors persist until manually dismissed.

name: Confirm Destructive Actions
description: Show confirmation dialog before delete or irreversible actions with clear cancel/confirm.

name: Progressive Disclosure
description: Show simple options first. Reveal advanced options only when needed.
tags: progressive disclosure advanced options simple first

name: Validate on Blur Not Keystroke
description: Trigger validation when user leaves the field (blur) not while typing.
tags: inline validation blur keystroke form ux

name: Show/Hide Password Toggle
description: Password fields need a visibility toggle button.

name: Undo for Destructive Actions
description: Offer undo capability for bulk or destructive actions via snackbar/toast.

name: Error Messages State Cause + Fix
description: Error messages must explain what went wrong AND how to fix it. Not just 'Invalid input'.
tags: error message clarity cause fix actionable

name: Auto-focus First Invalid Field
description: After form submission error auto-focus the first invalid field.

name: Destructive Actions Use Red
description: Delete/irreversible actions use semantic danger (red) color and are separated from primary actions.

name: Bottom Navigation Max 5 Items
description: Bottom navigation bar maximum 5 items each with icon and label.
tags: bottom nav 5 items label icon navigation

name: Predictable Back Navigation
description: Back navigation must be consistent and predictable. Preserve scroll position and state.

name: All Key Screens Deep-linkable
description: Every important screen must have a shareable URL for notifications and bookmarking.

name: Labels + Icons in Navigation
description: Navigation items must have both icon and text label. Icon-only navigation hurts discoverability.
tags: nav label icon text navigation ux

name: Highlight Active Navigation Item
description: Current location must be visually highlighted in navigation (color weight indicator).

name: Clear Dismiss for Modals
description: Every modal and sheet must have a visible close button. Support Escape key and backdrop click.

name: Preserve Scroll and Filter on Back
description: Navigating back must restore previous scroll position and any active filters.
tags: state preservation scroll filter back navigation

name: Breadcrumbs for 3+ Level Deep
description: For hierarchies 3+ levels deep add breadcrumb navigation for orientation.

name: Navigation Position Consistent
description: Navigation placement (sidebar topbar bottom) must not change between pages.

name: Core Navigation Always Accessible
description: Main navigation must be reachable from deep pages. Don't hide it in sub-flows.

name: Match Chart to Data Type
description: Line for time trends. Bar for comparisons. Pie/donut max 5 categories. Scatter for correlations.
tags: chart type data match trend comparison

name: Accessible Chart Colors
description: Don't rely on red/green only pairs (colorblind). Use patterns textures as supplement.

name: Always Show Chart Legend
description: Legend must be visible near the chart not hidden below a scroll fold.

name: Tooltips on Hover/Click
description: Provide tooltips showing exact values on hover (desktop) or tap (mobile).

name: Label Axes with Units
description: Label both axes with units and readable scale. No truncated or rotated labels on mobile.
tags: chart axis labels units scale readable

name: Meaningful Empty Chart State
description: When no data show informative message with guidance. Not a blank/broken chart.
tags: chart empty state no data message

name: Skeleton for Chart Loading
description: Show skeleton or shimmer placeholder while chart data loads. Not empty axes.

name: Bar Chart Over Pie for 5+ Categories
description: For more than 5 categories use horizontal bar chart instead of pie.

name: Charts Responsive on Mobile
description: Charts must reflow or simplify on small screens. Consider fewer ticks horizontal bar.

name: Subtle Grid Lines
description: Grid lines should be low-contrast (gray-100/200) to not compete with data.
